REPLY IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CARRERA, PHILLIP

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT PHILLIP CARRERA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE NOTICE TO VACATE IS DEFECTIVE BECAUSE IT DOES NOT INCLUDE THE RENT BOARD ADVICE, AND A SUBSEQUENT NOTICE CANNOT CURE THAT DEFICIENCY AS TO THE EARLIER NOTICE TO VACATE. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: NICHOLE RODICH CSR# 11604
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO DEFENDANT CARRERA, PHILLIP

calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-23-2008 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT PHILLIP CARRERA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE NOTICE TO VACATE IS DEFECTIVE BECAUSE IT DOES NOT INCLUDE THE RENT BOARD ADVICE, AND A SUBSEQUENT NOTICE CANNOT CURE THAT DEFICIENCY AS TO THE EARLIER NOTICE TO VACATE. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Nichole Rodich CSR# 11604 =301/PJB/BD
